sourceText: Oh, Philippines! My own land, my sorrow, my hope.
translatedText: Oh, Philippines! Ƙasa tawa, baƙin cikina, begena.

sourceText: This quote expresses a deep love for one's homeland, compassion for its suffering, and hope for its future, all at once.
translatedText: Wannan furucin yana bayyana tsananin soyayya ga ƙasar mahaifar mutum, da tausayin wahalar da take ciki, da bege ga makomarta, gaba ɗaya.

sourceText: Maxwell experienced the sorrow of losing his mother at a young age and faced health challenges during his studies. Furthermore, his groundbreaking electromagnetic theories did not receive immediate acceptance from the scientific community of his time, leading to feelings of frustration.
translatedText: Maxwell ya fuskanci baƙin cikin rashin mahaifiyarsa tun yana ƙarami kuma ya fuskanci ƙalubalen lafiya a lokacin karatunsa. Bugu da ƙari, ka'idodin na'urorin lantarki na zamani ba su sami karɓuwa nan da nan daga al'ummar kimiyya na zamaninsa ba, wanda ya haifar da jin dadi.

sourceText: He overcame difficulties through his deep religious faith and relentless spirit of academic inquiry. Despite setbacks, he persevered in his physics research, refined his theories through active collaboration with peers, and ultimately achieved recognition for his contributions.
translatedText: Ya shawo kan matsaloli ta wurin zurfin imaninsa na addini da ruhin binciken ilimi. Duk da koma baya, ya jajirce wajen binciken ilimin kimiyyar lissafi, ya gyara tunaninsa ta hanyar hada kai da takwarorinsa, kuma daga karshe ya samu karbuwa saboda gudunmawar da ya bayar.

sourceText: We can only understand what we love.
translatedText: Za mu iya fahimtar abin da muke so kawai.

sourceText: Maxwell believed that true understanding is achieved only when one possesses a deep affection and interest in the object of intellectual inquiry.
translatedText: Maxwell ya yi imanin cewa fahimtar gaskiya tana samuwa ne kawai lokacin da mutum ya kasance yana da zurfin ƙauna da sha'awar abin tambaya na hankali.

sourceText: Mathematics is the language, and nature is the book written in that language.
translatedText: Lissafi shine harshen, kuma yanayi shine littafin da aka rubuta a cikin wannan harshe.

sourceText: He considered mathematics to be an essential tool for describing and understanding natural phenomena.
translatedText: Ya ɗauki lissafi a matsayin kayan aiki mai mahimmanci don kwatantawa da fahimtar abubuwan da suka faru na halitta.

sourceText: Knowledge is like an ever-expanding universe.
translatedText: Ilimi kamar sararin samaniya ne da ke ci gaba da fadadawa.

sourceText: Maxwell believed that learning has no end and that one must constantly explore new frontiers of knowledge.
translatedText: Maxwell ya yi imanin cewa koyo ba shi da iyaka kuma dole ne a ci gaba da bincika sabbin iyakokin ilimi.

sourceText: The invasion by Spanish conquistadors, the threat of imperial collapse, internal rebellions, and ultimately, capture and a tragic death.
translatedText: Mamayewar da masu ci na Spain suka yi, barazanar rugujewar daular, tawaye na cikin gida, kuma daga ƙarshe, kamawa da mutuwa mai ban tausayi.

sourceText: Attempted to preserve the empire through diplomacy and negotiation, but ultimately strove to maintain dignity amidst the inevitable conflict with the Spanish.
translatedText: Ƙoƙarin kiyaye daular ta hanyar diflomasiyya da tattaunawa, amma a ƙarshe ya yi ƙoƙari don kiyaye mutunci a cikin rikici marar makawa tare da Mutanen Espanya.

sourceText: When we realize we can no longer give what we are given, we can no longer give anything.
translatedText: Idan muka gane ba za mu iya ba da abin da aka ba mu ba, ba za mu iya ba da komai ba.
